expectations.text: A security-report.md file is written to outputs/
Dockerfile is read and audited (non-root user, base image, COPY vs ADD)
expectations.evidence: 14 occurrences of USER/non-root/slim/COPY; LOW-001 covers missing USER, alpine image and COPY usage noted in passed checks

expectations.text: docker-compose.yml port binding is checked (127.0.0.1 vs 0.0.0.0)
expectations.evidence: 14 occurrences of 127.0.0.1/port/exposed/binding; web port correctly bound to 127.0.0.1 noted in passed checks

expectations.text: Checks whether postgres and redis ports are exposed externally
expectations.evidence: Confirmed postgres/redis ports not exposed externally — in passed checks section

expectations.text: Trivy is either run or documented as missing with install instructions
expectations.evidence: 14 occurrences of trivy; not installed, documented with 'brew install trivy' and 'brew install trufflehog'

expectations.text: Checks how credentials are handled in docker-compose.yml
expectations.evidence: DB credentials from env vars noted in passed checks; HIGH-002 covers hardcoded fallback superuser password
HIGH-001, HIGH-002, MEDIUM-001 through 003, LOW-001 through 003 structure used
